findings.detail: Hypothesis fields (hypothesis, expectation_gap, core_logic, direction, risk_level, time_window) inserted into Pro prompts via .format(). All fields are LLM-generated (pipeline internal), not user-provided. No direct injection surface.
findings.mitigation: Input_guard sanitization at gateway level provides defense-in-depth.

findings.detail: Budget check gates both main scenario call (1536 tokens reserved) and optional tail-risk call (1024 tokens reserved). Calls budget.reserve_pro() before each call. Budget exhausted → returns None gracefully.
findings.mitigation: Adequate. Both calls independently check can_call_pro().

notes: datetime.now(timezone.utc) used for generated_at timestamp. JSON parsing handles markdown wrapping. try/except on full forecast_scenarios function returns None on failure. Verdict gating: only ACTIONABLE or MONITOR+include_tail_risk trigger calls.
